seo.title: Ruben's Auto Repair | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX | (469) 648-9496
seo.description: Family-owned auto repair in Dallas since 1985. Expert diagnostics, brakes, engines, and more. Honest pricing, guaranteed work. Call (469) 648-9496.

hero.headline: Your Car Deserves a Mechanic Who Cares
hero.subheadline: Expert diagnostics, transparent pricing, and a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty on all repairs.

featureSections.title: We Find the Problem – and Fix It Right
featureSections.body: No guesswork, no unnecessary repairs. Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment pinpoints issues quickly, and we explain everything in plain English before any work begins.
bullets: Free multi-point inspection with every service
Digital photos and videos of findings
Itemized estimates with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: Every repair is backed by our 12-month/12,000-mile warranty. If something goes wrong, we fix it at no cost to you.

featureSections.title: From Oil Changes to Engine Overhauls
featureSections.body: Whether it's routine maintenance or major repairs, our ASE-certified technicians have the skills and tools to handle any make or model. We use only quality parts and fluids.
featureSections.cardBody: Need to get around while we work? Ask about our free shuttle service within Dallas or a loaner vehicle for longer repairs.

whyChooseUs.title: Family-Owned & Operated
whyChooseUs.description: We treat every customer like a neighbor. Our reputation is built on honesty and quality work, not sales quotas.

whyChooseUs.title: ASE-Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Every mechanic on our team holds current ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll never get a surprise bill. We provide detailed estimates upfront and call you if anything changes during the repair.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs are completed same-day or within 24 hours. We respect your time and keep our promises.

testimonials.quote: I brought my old truck in for a mysterious squeal. Ruben's found a worn belt in minutes and had it replaced the same day. Fair price, great communication.
testimonials.author: Mike T.

testimonials.quote: After a bad experience at a chain shop, Ruben's restored my faith in mechanics. They explained everything, showed me the old parts, and the car runs like new.
testimonials.author: Lisa R.

testimonials.quote: Our whole family has been coming here for years. They're honest, reliable, and always stand behind their work. Couldn't ask for more.
testimonials.author: David M.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience the Ruben's Difference?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and see why Dallas trusts us with their cars.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our ASE-certified team provides expert auto repair services for all makes and models. Every service comes with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Stop safely with precision brake services – pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid flush.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. Our technicians inspect every component – pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid – to ensure reliable stopping power. We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.
benefits: Restored stopping distance and pedal feel
Elimination of squeaks, vibrations, and pulling
Extended brake component life with proper fluid maintenance
Safety inspection included with every service

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor runout, and check caliper operation. A road test confirms any symptoms.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We replace worn components with quality parts, lubricate slides, and bleed the system to remove air.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: After a final road test, we ensure smooth, quiet operation and proper pedal feel before returning your car.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Most pads last 30,000-70,000 miles depending on driving habits. We recommend inspection every 10,000 miles.

faqs.question: Do you resurface rotors or replace them?
faqs.answer: We measure rotors against minimum thickness specs. If they're within tolerance, we resurface; otherwise, we recommend replacement for safety.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint engine issues – from check engine lights to major overhauls.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your engine runs rough, our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify the root cause. We specialize in everything from sensor replacements to complete engine rebuilds, using OEM-quality parts and factory procedures.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money
Extended engine life with proper repairs
Warranty coverage on all parts and labor

process.title: Scan & Analyze
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer, read fault codes, and review live data to understand the issue.

process.title: Verify & Test
process.description: We perform additional tests (compression, leak-down, fuel pressure) to confirm the diagnosis.

process.title: Repair & Recheck
process.description: After repair, we clear codes, road test, and re-scan to ensure the problem is resolved.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose a check engine light without a code?
faqs.answer: Yes – we can read pending codes and use live data to identify intermittent issues.

faqs.question: Do you rebuild engines or just replace them?
faqs.answer: We offer both options. Rebuilding can be cost-effective, but we'll recommend the best solution based on the engine's condition.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your car running smoothly with regular oil changes and factory-scheduled maintenance.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the simplest way to extend your engine's life. We use high-quality synthetic and conventional oils, along with genuine filters. Our multi-point inspection catches small issues before they become big problems.
benefits: Convenient appointment times and quick service

process.title: Drain & Refill
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the correct grade and quantity.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, brakes, lights, and wipers – and share findings with you.

process.title: Reset & Record
process.description: We reset your oil life monitor and affix a reminder sticker for your next service.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Modern vehicles typically need oil changes every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual or ask us.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes – we offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic options to match your vehicle's requirements.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Stay comfortable year-round with expert AC and heating system diagnostics and repair.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving unbearable. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and repair all climate control systems – from refrigerant leaks to blend door actuators. We use specialized equipment to recover, recycle, and recharge refrigerant properly.
benefits: Restored cabin comfort in all seasons
Elimination of unusual odors or noises

process.title: Performance Test
process.description: We measure vent temperatures, pressures, and inspect for leaks using UV dye and electronic detectors.

process.title: Diagnose & Estimate
process.description: We identify the faulty component (compressor, condenser, evaporator, etc.) and provide a clear estimate.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We replace defective parts, evacuate the system, and recharge with the exact amount of refrigerant specified.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant (leak), a faulty compressor, or a failed expansion valve. We'll diagnose the exact issue.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years. Regular use keeps seals lubricated and helps prevent leaks.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Auto Repair Since 1985
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps our community safe on the road – with transparent pricing and a smile.
story: Ruben's Auto Repair was founded in 1985 by Ruben Martinez, a master mechanic with a simple philosophy: treat every car like it belongs to your mother. Starting in a small two-bay shop on Peak Street, Ruben built a reputation for integrity and skilled work. Over the decades, the business has grown but never lost its family feel. Today, Ruben's son Carlos leads a team of ASE-certified technicians who share that same commitment to excellence.

We've served generations of Dallas families, from Deep Ellum to Lakewood and beyond. Our shop has expanded to handle modern vehicles with advanced electronics, but our core values remain unchanged: fair pricing, quality parts, and standing behind every repair. When you bring your car to Ruben's, you're not just a customer – you're part of our family.

coreValues.title: Honesty
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. If it doesn't need fixing, we'll tell you.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use premium parts and follow manufacturer procedures to ensure lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your time and your budget with respect – clear estimates, on-time completion.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business that supports Dallas schools, sports teams, and charities.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to book? Give us a call or stop by – we'd love to help.
